title: cacalia sericea
intro: Cacalia sericea, also known as woolly baccharis or woolly cacalia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cacalia sericea include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cacalia sericea can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
